title: A4 Recycled Sugar Paper Pastel Colours 50 Sheets in 10 Assorted Colours, Great for Kids Arts & Crafts, Drawing, Painting & Scrap Booking. 30 x 21cm Sheet Size
features: BCreativetolearn 50 Sheets Pastel A4 Sugar Paper - Each A4 sheet measures in size 30 x 21cm & has a slightly raised texture. Perfect for many uses, such as painting, drawing, cut & stick crafts, sketches, oil pastels, charcoals & more.
Pastel Coloured Recycled Sugar Paper - 10 Assorted pastel colours in each pack: Light Red, Orange, White, Lilac, Buff, Blue, Green, Grey, Pink & Yellow.

100% Recycled Paper - This sugar paper is eco friendly, is produced in the UK & made from 100% recycled fibers & wood pulp. As it is recycled, colour shades can vary from batch to batch but always remains fantastic!

Sugar Paper - A great value paper & a staple in schools and nurseries as this paper is high quality, recycled, sustainable & at a great cost point. It has hundreds of uses from collage, to backing paper, from large artworks to scrap booking.
100gsm Paper - At 100gsm this sugar paper is lightweight & will flow through most home use inkjet & laser printers, printing over coloured paper can provide a great finish for lots of printing jobs.
description: Product Description A4 Sheets of Pastel Coloured 100gsm Sugar Paper A4 Pastel Coloured Sheets Each sheet is textured, consistently coloured and high quality. The sheets are 21 x 29.7 cm - a great size for making doodles and paintings. Made From Sustainable Sources Our pastel coloured sugar paper is made from sustainable sources and produced using 100% recycled paper and card pulp. A Great Selection Of Pastel Colours A selection of 10 pastel colours per pack, 5 sheets of each: Light Red, Orange, White, Lilac, Buff, Blue, Green, Grey, Pink & Yellow. All sheets are consistently coloured throughout. 100gsm Paper Sheets Lightweight recycled sugar paper sheets, can be used for a wide variety of crafts and printed on using most home printers. Product Description Assorted pastel coloured sugar paper, 100% recycled & is the ideal paper for kids to be creative at school or at home. This pack of A4 sugar paper contains 50 sheets in a mix of 10 shades of pastel coloured paper: Light Red, Orange, White, Lilac, Buff, Blue, Green, Grey, Pink & Yellow, you'll have plenty of options when it comes to producing your creative vision. Sugar paper is the perfect paper for children's art & crafts. Such as drawing, PVA sticking, scrap booking, hand printing & painting. A school & nursery favorite, as paint adheres to its surface well & doesn't bleed through to the other side. It's great for people who suffer with dyslexia or dyscalculia as it's easier for them to work with coloured paper. At a paper weight of 100gsm it's easy to snip & cut, a great choice for paper chains or any number of other paper shapes. A light weight paper, it shouldn't have any issues passing through a household printer, but you should always check your printer specifications first. Need something to complement your crafts? Pick from our selection below.
